creator: jonathan.chen@itouch.co.nz
text:
Running Swing demos and applications under jdk13 will result in lots
of warning lines unless the URW fonts are installed.

Fix: Patch to fix included:
How-To-Repeat: 
Make sure URW fonts aren't installed or in the FontPath.

	> cd /usr/local/jdk1.3.1/demo/jfc/SwingSet2
	> /usr/local/jdk1.3.1/bin/java -jar SwingSet2.jar
